name: Vegetable Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can Garbanzo Beans, drained and rinsed
1/4 cup Fresh Basil, minced or 4 tsp Dried Basil
1/4 cup Fresh Oregano, minced or 1 tbsp Dried Oregano
1/4 tsp Dried Hot Red Chilies, crushed (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil until the onion is translucent.
2. Add the garbanzo beans and tomatoes; blend until finely chopped but not smooth.
3. Stir in the red wine, tomato paste, zucchini, mushrooms, parsley, basil (or dried basil), oregano (or dried oregano), carrot, salt, black pepper, and chilies.
4. Simmer uncovered for 45 minutes to an hour, stirring occasionally.
5. This sauce is great over pasta; serves 4-6 people.
